## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the commands you ran and their outcomes.

- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make detekt` (when applicable)
- [ ] Additional targeted verification

## Checklist

- [ ] Public API changes include KDoc and docs updates.
- [ ] Boundary parsing changes return typed errors.
- [ ] Determinism and ordering behavior remain explicit.
- [ ] Module dependency boundaries are preserved.
- [ ] New behavior includes tests.
